name: Saganaki
method: Water should be brushed on both sides of the kasseri cheese.
Dredge all sides in starch, ensuring to cover the entire surface.
Steam a well-seasoned stainless steel skillet over medium-high heat
Pour in the extra virgin olive oil.
Position the floured cheese in the hot oil with care.
Heat for about two minutes, or until the cheese starts to ooze and a
With a spoon, quickly turn the cheese over. Fry till the bottom of the
Remove the skillet from the heat and put it on a plate lined with tea
Brandy should be poured over the cheese.
Then use a fireplace flame, light the brandy.
To put out the last few fires, pour some lime juice on edge.
